scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.dev:windows: start powershell -NoExit -Command "cd d:\Crypto-Stream\artifacts\api-server ; npm run start" ; start powershell -NoExit -Command "cd d:\Crypto-Stream\artifacts\price-tracker ; npm run dev"
scripts.dev:mac: concurrently "cd artifacts/api-server && export NODE_ENV=development && pnpm run dev:tsx" "cd artifacts/price-tracker && pnpm run dev"
